_meta.description: 60-second fashion/lifestyle ad. Music-first. Extended editorial sequence with a dedicated detail-inserts section for product close-ups. Purely visual — no dialogue, no supers beyond brand identity.

sections.name: Cold open
sections.notes: Single atmospheric frame. Room tone or music ambient only. Sets the world.

sections.name: Brand reveal
sections.notes: Brand name or season title over hero visual. Crossfade in.

sections.name: Editorial
sections.notes: 5–6 editorial shots. Widths vary: establishing → medium → detail. Cuts on musical phrase ends every 4–5s.

sections.name: Detail inserts
sections.notes: Tight product-focused details: texture, construction, label, silhouette. Faster rhythm — 2–3s per cut.

sections.name: Campaign line
sections.notes: Tagline + season identifier. Clip with minimal motion. Music decelerates or reaches a quiet phrase here.

sections.name: Logo sting
sections.notes: Brand logo on solid or atmospheric bg. Music fades on last beat. 1s silence after music ends.

clips.notes: Mood-setter. Texture, environment, or abstract motion. No faces yet.
Hero product or model in brand context. Deliberate, confident.
Wide establishing shot — location or set context.
Full-length or 3/4 model shot showing the outfit / collection piece.
Motion-forward shot: fabric flow, hair movement, environmental texture in wind.
Medium close-up of model. Gaze or expression is the focus.
Product in context — worn, used, or placed in the aspirational environment.
The most cinematic shot of the session. Save it for the editorial finale.
Extreme close on fabric texture, weave, or material surface.
Metal hardware, zipper, button, or closure detail.
Brand label, embossed logo, or signature element.
Graphic silhouette or contour shot — edge, seam, or drape.
Hands interacting with product — fastening, holding, or touching.
Low-motion clip (or still with subtle ken-burns). Tagline holds for full section.
Brand logo on solid bg. Music fades here.

music.notes: Music is primary — no ducking. Align track start to visual cold open. Fade out over logo sting.
